name: revenuecat-mcp
description: Local MCP tools for the RevenueCat API.

interface.shortDescription: Use RevenueCat API tools in Codex.
interface.longDescription: Adds a local stdio MCP server for authenticated RevenueCat API workflows. Credentials are read from environment variables.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use the RevenueCat MCP tools to inspect projects, customers, subscribers, and API resources.
